description: Public-safe real-project holdout seeds for Unreal compile-fix workflow evaluation. These are compact log-style cases, not proprietary project reproductions.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'GameplayTagContainer.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Module resolver should identify GameplayTags before a Build.cs patch is proposed.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'EnhancedInputComponent.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should not invent input mapping code when the actionable issue is a missing module dependency.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'Blueprint/UserWidget.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Public UI-facing headers may require PublicDependencyModuleNames depending on exposure.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'NiagaraComponent.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should resolve Niagara dependency before touching effect behavior.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'AIController.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should route to module_fix and identify AIModule.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'NavigationSystem.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should identify NavigationSystem without guessing gameplay behavior.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'LevelSequence.h': No such file or directory
error: #include found after .generated.h file - the .generated.h file should always be the last #include in a header
UnrealHeaderTool failed: GENERATED_BODY missing for reflected type declared with UCLASS
cases.notes: Reflection route should be selected before implementation edits.

cases.errorLog: error LNK2019: unresolved external symbol "public: void __cdecl UDemoComponent::StartDash(void)" referenced in function
cases.notes: Should not jump to Build.cs without module evidence.

cases.errorLog: BlueprintNativeEvent function OnInteract_Implementation not found for declaration
cases.notes: Should add or correct _Implementation rather than duplicate virtual declarations.

cases.errorLog: Runtime module includes UnrealEd.h; Editor-only include detected in runtime module
forbiddenPatchTargets: adding UnrealEd to runtime module as default fix
cases.notes: Should prefer module boundary or editor guards over adding UnrealEd to runtime dependencies.
